channel.title: No Humans Were Harmed
channel.description: No humans were harmed in the making of this podcast. No burnout, no late nights, no stress. Just AI doing the reading so humans don't have to. Tech and science deep dives, generated entirely by machines.
channel.itunes:author: Drashti Shah
channel.itunes:summary: No humans were harmed in the making of this podcast. No burnout, no late nights, no stress. Just AI doing the reading so humans don't have to. Tech and science deep dives, generated entirely by machines.

item.title: Feature Flags & Safe Production Deployment
item.description: How to ship code without breaking things. Feature flags, canary deployments, blue-green deployments, trunk-based development. What changes when AI agents write the code — and why testing agent-written code is a different problem from testing agents. Generated with Google NotebookLM.
item.content:encoded: How to ship code without breaking things. Feature flags, canary deployments, blue-green deployments, trunk-based development. What changes when AI agents write the code — and why testing agent-written code is a different problem from testing agents. Generated with Google NotebookLM.
item.itunes:summary: How to ship code without breaking things. Feature flags, canary deployments, blue-green deployments, trunk-based development. What changes when AI agents write the code — and why testing agent-written code is a different problem from testing agents. Generated with Google NotebookLM.

item.title: CLI Tools for AI Agents
item.description: Agents need tools. The simplest ones live in the terminal. Git, shell commands, APIs. This episode walks through how to build them. What makes a tool agent-friendly. Why the command line still matters. Generated with Google NotebookLM.
item.content:encoded: Agents need tools. The simplest ones live in the terminal. Git, shell commands, APIs. This episode walks through how to build them. What makes a tool agent-friendly. Why the command line still matters. Generated with Google NotebookLM.
item.itunes:summary: Agents need tools. The simplest ones live in the terminal. Git, shell commands, APIs. This episode walks through how to build them. What makes a tool agent-friendly. Why the command line still matters. Generated with Google NotebookLM.

item.title: EvoScientist — AI Agents for Scientific Discovery
item.description: What happens when you let AI agents design their own experiments. EvoScientist builds hypotheses, runs tests, and iterates on results. No human scientist in the loop. This episode breaks down how it works and what it means. Generated with Google NotebookLM.
item.content:encoded: What happens when you let AI agents design their own experiments. EvoScientist builds hypotheses, runs tests, and iterates on results. No human scientist in the loop. This episode breaks down how it works and what it means. Generated with Google NotebookLM.
item.itunes:summary: What happens when you let AI agents design their own experiments. EvoScientist builds hypotheses, runs tests, and iterates on results. No human scientist in the loop. This episode breaks down how it works and what it means. Generated with Google NotebookLM.
